bosses.name: Chopper
bosses.tip: Avoid Charged Whisker — inflicts Paralysis on hit.

bosses.name: Captain Madison
bosses.tip: Fought twice; spawns adds at 50% HP in the second encounter. Sandslinger inflicts accuracy penalties.

bosses.name: Denn the Orcatoothed
bosses.tip: Hydroball is a conal AoE that Silences — keep the boss faced away from the party. Adds spawn from arena grates; ignore them and focus the boss.

bosses.name: Void Soulcounter
bosses.tip: Encountered three times. Enthunder adds lightning damage; dodge the Dark Orb and Condemnation conal AoEs.

bosses.name: Galvanth the Dominator
bosses.tip: Summons waves of adds that must be killed to make the boss vulnerable again. Mind Blast paralyses — avoid the AoE. Drain Touch heals the boss while damaging the tank.

bosses.name: Kottos
bosses.tip: Grand Slam is a tankbuster; dodge Lumbering Leap circular AoEs by moving to the arena edges.

bosses.name: Ichorous Ire
bosses.tip: Splits into multiple Ichorous Drips at 50% HP — each casts Burst (circle AoE). Spread out and kill the drips quickly.

bosses.name: Gyges the Great
bosses.tip: Gigantic Swing is a donut AoE — move into the boss hitbox to dodge it. Gigantic Smash adds further AoE patterns; Grand Slam is a tankbuster.

bosses.name: Firemane
bosses.tip: Casts two sets of four directional fire cones — watch positioning carefully and move between the gaps.

bosses.name: Thunderclap Guivre
bosses.tip: Move to safe zones immediately when the water crackles with electricity to avoid the devastating room-wide AoE.

bosses.name: Pit Peiste
bosses.tip: Optional boss spawned by treasure chests. Commonly skipped — spawns Rudis Beak adds.

bosses.name: Tangata
bosses.tip: Destroy spawned wisps before they reach the boss or they grant a fire immunity shield. Multi-stage AoE attacks follow the shield phase.

bosses.name: Coeurl O' Nine Tails
bosses.tip: Encountered twice. Acid Mist poisons the entire party — manage the debuff carefully across both fights.

bosses.name: Graffias
bosses.tip: Toxic puddles slow players; explosive pod adds spawn throughout. At 50% the tail becomes a separate target — destroying it grants temporary boss vulnerability and summons more enemies.

bosses.name: Manor Claviger
bosses.tip: Sweet Steel is an untelegraphed cone AoE — tank faces boss away from party. Stun the boss to cancel the room-wide Dark Mist spell.

bosses.name: Manor Jester & Manor Steward
bosses.tip: Kill the Jester first (higher damage output). Stun the Steward's large Soul Drain AoE.

bosses.name: Lady Amandine
bosses.tip: Seduce debuff forces you to walk toward her while adds use gaze attacks — look away to avoid the damage. Interrupt her interruptible spells.

bosses.name: Great Yellow Pelican
bosses.tip: Spawns poisonous adds periodically. Cone attacks inflict paralysis — use cleanses.

bosses.name: Inferno Drake
bosses.tip: An add spawns at 75% HP. Brayflox periodically enrages and performs a cleave — interrupt it.

bosses.name: Hellbender
bosses.tip: Circular AoEs target random players. Party members trapped in bubbles need the add killed to be freed.

bosses.name: Aiatar
bosses.tip: Tankbuster applies poison. Toxic pods grow and explode — destroy them quickly. Line AoEs target random members.

bosses.name: Teratotaur
bosses.tip: Step on glowing plates when Mortal Ray (doom) is applied to remove the debuff before it kills you.

bosses.name: Temple Guardian
bosses.tip: Destroy the Golem Soulstone add immediately — it stuns the boss and makes it vulnerable.

bosses.name: Adjudicator
bosses.tip: Mythril Verge adds gain haste stacks — kill them quickly. Avoid Dark II conal AoEs and break free from bind chains.

bosses.name: Myrmidon Princess
bosses.tip: Spawns adds periodically. Dodge Stone II circle AoEs and the frontal Mandible Bite cone.

bosses.name: Giant Tunnel Worm
bosses.tip: Watch for Sand Pillar ground hazards when burrowed. Bottomless Desert pulls the group when the worm resurfaces.

bosses.name: Chimera
bosses.tip: Watch eye colour changes — Dragon's Voice: move in (dodge donut AoE); Ram's Voice: move away (dodge point-blank AoE). Do not rely solely on ground indicators.

bosses.name: Chudo-Yudo
bosses.tip: Stand behind the dragon at all times to avoid frontal breath attacks that inflict Silence and Pacification.

bosses.name: Koshchei
bosses.tip: Reposition into safe zones to avoid tornadoes moving in straight lines — the pattern shifts after the first cast.

bosses.name: Isgebind
bosses.tip: Avoid glowing blue zones during frost breath. Dodge circular AoEs and the Touchdown attack after aerial phases.

bosses.name: All-seeing Eye
bosses.tip: Dodge sequential circular AoEs — move to the centre then back out as each wave activates.

bosses.name: Taulurd
bosses.tip: Untargetable adds on elevated platforms perform ranged attacks. Cone AoEs intensify as HP drops.

bosses.name: Batraal
bosses.tip: Destroy crystals throughout the fight. Desolation column attacks are lethal — keep moving and prioritise crystal destruction.

bosses.name: Locksmith
bosses.tip: Gold Lung stacks cannot be cleansed by Esuna — interact with Morbol Fruits scattered in the arena to remove stacks.

bosses.name: Coincounter
bosses.tip: One-hand attack is a cone; two-hand is a circular AoE — both can be interrupted.

bosses.name: Miser's Mistress
bosses.tip: Face away from non-tanks. At 50% HP, five Morbol Fruits spawn — destroy them immediately before they hatch into adds that apply stacking debuffs.

bosses.name: The Black Eft
bosses.tip: Summons imperial soldier adds. Magitek Cannon targets random players with heavy damage.

bosses.name: Magitek Vanguard F-1
bosses.tip: Hypercharge leaves only a small safe zone — reposition quickly. Overcharge inflicts Paralysis.

bosses.name: Livia sas Junius
bosses.tip: Infinite Reach uses sequential line and circle AoEs — memorise the pattern. Artificial Plasma phase intensifies at low HP.

bosses.name: Mark II Magitek Colossus
bosses.tip: Ceruleum Vent deals unavoidable raid-wide damage — healers keep the party topped. Dodge moving circle and cone AoEs.

bosses.name: Nero tol Scaeva
bosses.tip: Stay away from the electrified arena perimeter. Manage stack markers and dodge knockback attacks while handling adds.

bosses.name: Gaius van Baelsar
bosses.tip: Heavy tankbusters and raid-wide damage. At low HP he summons four phantoms — burn them down. His energy bar reaching 100% is an instant party wipe.

bosses.name: Keeper of Halidom
bosses.tip: Do not stand in front — Beatdown and Moldy Sneeze hit hard. Inhale pulls players inward; manage spread carefully.

bosses.name: Giant Bavarois
bosses.tip: Continuously spawns coloured adds. Purple (Paralysis) and White (Heavy) variants are most dangerous — kill quickly.

bosses.name: Tonberry King
bosses.tip: Stay within melee range of the boss to avoid Scourge of Nym. Everybody's Grudge damage escalates with each Tonberry add absorbed — minimise stacks.

bosses.name: Lunatic Priest & Psycheflayer
bosses.tip: Psycheflayer spawns at 50% HP — dodge Void Fire II circles and kill its summoned adds immediately.

bosses.name: Demon Wall
bosses.tip: Alternates column attack patterns between centre and sides. Position correctly before Repel's knockback deals heavy damage.

bosses.name: Anantaboga
bosses.tip: Position at the flanks to avoid front and rear cone debuff attacks. Use environmental statues for cover against orb abilities.

bosses.name: Hecatoncheir Mastermind
bosses.tip: Darkfire spawns Flambeaus every 45–60 s — kill them immediately or they explode and wipe the party.

bosses.name: Gogmagolem & Biggy
bosses.tip: Use the Improved Blasting Device to place a Waymaker Bomb in the boss's path. Biggy emerges on defeat — avoid large explosive detonations.

bosses.name: Ouranos
bosses.tip: When a Sand Worm appears, grab a Crystallised Rock from the arena edge and place it to distract the creature before it pulls the group.

bosses.name: Manor Jester
bosses.tip: Void Blizzard damages and applies Slow — cleanse debuffs and kill spawning adds while dodging ice patches.

bosses.name: Ash
bosses.tip: Avoid glowing spirit-cutter cleaves. Abyssal Transfixion inflicts Paralysis.

bosses.name: Halicarnassus
bosses.tip: DPS race — add absorptions at full HP trigger unavoidable lethal damage. Kill the boss before the third Beguiling Mist or the charm mechanic overwhelms the party.

bosses.name: Symond the Unsinkable
bosses.tip: Corrupting Crystal stacks explode at three — burn adds quickly and avoid puddle AoEs.

bosses.name: Zu
bosses.tip: Only kill one egg when prompted — destroying multiple triggers a devastating bodyslam that wipes the party.

bosses.name: Tyrant
bosses.tip: Tank picks up Sailor adds; AoE them alongside the boss or simply burn the boss down quickly.

bosses.name: Siren
bosses.tip: Siren Song gives 12 seconds to be healed to full HP or the player turns on allies. Boss gains a healing-reduction buff at low HP — adjust output accordingly.

bosses.name: Decaying Gourmand
bosses.tip: Devour marks and swallows a player — defeat the Voracious Maw add to free them. Cleanse poison stacks from room-wide attacks.

bosses.name: Arioch
bosses.tip: Kill Ranch Wamoura adds — their Scale Flakes debuff stacks make the boss targetable. Dodge large cone and room-wide AoEs plus expanding poison puddles.

bosses.name: Diabolos
bosses.tip: Open matching door pairs (matching symbols) to teleport and manage Diabolic Curse stacks. Too many stacks leads to wipes — coordinate door positioning.

bosses.name: Pyracmon
bosses.tip: Pull the lever to gain the Manawall buff before the boss's 1000 Tonze Swing — without it the attack is lethal.

bosses.name: Catoblepas
bosses.tip: Activate pedestals to gain the Gloam buff for Demonic Eye protection. DPS the exposed eye before it turns red and stacks debuffs on the party.

bosses.name: Four Gladiators
bosses.tip: Prioritise the healer first, then the bard, then the remaining fighters while managing their individual mechanics.

bosses.name: Mumuepo & Narasimha
bosses.tip: Find the lever when Mumuepo casts chains to free allies. After Mumuepo falls, Narasimha uses basic tail swipes and AoEs.

bosses.name: Illuminati Commander
bosses.tip: Illuminati Sniper adds tether to a player and deal continuous damage — kill them fast. Dodge spiked bombs and circle AoEs.

bosses.name: Magitek Vangob G-III
bosses.tip: Ceruleum puddles explode when triggered — tank positions boss away from liquid pools. Kill adds and dodge line AoEs and charge attacks.

bosses.name: Gobmachine G-VI
bosses.tip: At ~75/50/25% HP the boss circles the room untargetable — kill spawned adds and disperse bombs. Resume damage when it becomes targetable again.

bosses.name: Sasquatch
bosses.tip: Feed the boss bananas from interactive trees to interrupt chest-pounding arena-wide damage. Prevent monkey adds from eating the fruit first.

bosses.name: Sjoorm
bosses.tip: Get inside a protective bubble to survive the room-wide whirlpool attack. Avoid targeted water puddles between casts.

bosses.name: Kraken
bosses.tip: Destroy all ten arms across multiple platforms — use waterspouts to travel between them. Players marked with tornadoes must relocate immediately to prevent massive explosions.

bosses.name: Frumious Koheel Ja
bosses.tip: Destroy burning spears thrown into the ground immediately — they apply stacking debuffs to the whole party.

bosses.name: Slithy Zolool Ja
bosses.tip: Identify which coloured totem applies which effect and claim them — unclaimed totems buff the boss.

bosses.name: Manxome Molaa Ja Ja
bosses.tip: Tank constantly repositions boss away from its dropped banners (damage/defence buffs). Stay close to avoid cone AoE; spread for the rotting gas mechanic.

bosses.name: Wandil
bosses.tip: Frozen debuff stacks to four and causes Deep Freeze stun — destroy Frost Bombs to reduce incoming pressure.

bosses.name: Yeti
bosses.tip: Updrift launches players before point-blank and donut AoEs — anticipate the follow-up pattern. Avoid the snowball breath.

bosses.name: Fenrir
bosses.tip: Lunar Cry drops icicles in a diamond pattern — hide behind the correct one or it's instant death. Alternates between tankbusters and party-wide hits.

bosses.name: Damaged Adjudicator
bosses.tip: Target the bright red core — the boss breaks apart and spawns adds. Move out of sand whirlpools or be pulled beneath the floor.

bosses.name: Sabotender Emperatriz
bosses.tip: Deal enough damage to interrupt her devastating room-wide cast. Eliminate adds and dodge telegraphed circle AoEs throughout.

bosses.name: Vicegerent to the Warden
bosses.tip: Avoid touching mummies — four stacks mummifies you and removes control. Dodge sword strikes by running behind the boss during its cast.

bosses.name: Liavinne
bosses.tip: Kite zombie adds but do not attack them — the marked player runs into the horde to trigger the boss's own AoE that eliminates them.

bosses.name: Spare Body
bosses.tip: Protect the NPC in the centre — intercept purple energy orbs from portals before they reach it, or the boss gains strength.

bosses.name: Avere Bravearm
bosses.tip: Kill zombie adds crawling from the arena edges before they reach the centre circle — each arrival strengthens the boss's final attack.

bosses.name: Karlabos
bosses.tip: Remove Slime debuffs immediately. Prey marks a player for Tail Screw — cleanse or mitigate quickly.

bosses.name: Captain Madison
bosses.tip: Sustain DPS through the gunfire phase. Multiple adds spawn at low HP — manage them before the fight concludes.

bosses.name: Kraken
bosses.tip: Focus the boss and arms — ignore tentacles entirely. Healers cleanse Blind from AoE attacks.

bosses.name: Anchag
bosses.tip: Hide behind statues to absorb tether AoE hits. The boss destroys statues with its rushing charge if they are in the way — reposition.

bosses.name: Boogyman
bosses.tip: Kill the Luminescence orb, grab the buff, and use it to reveal the invisible boss before adds spawn from reanimated corpses.

bosses.name: Ferdiad
bosses.tip: Kill tethered adds to stop his expanding circular AoE from consuming the arena. Free slimed players and reposition to avoid projectiles.

bosses.name: Gorynich
bosses.tip: Prevent adds from reaching the boss — their death explosions grant dangerous buffs. Swinge and Lion's Breath are frontal; Rake is a tankbuster.

bosses.name: Cuca Fera
bosses.tip: Operate the four arena cannons to damage the boss. Do not fire during Diamondback (reflects damage). Use Spindly Finger to interrupt Hard Stomp.

bosses.name: Giruveganaus
bosses.tip: Dodge shoulder tackle, tail swipe, and claw combos. At 60% a clone appears and the boss gains fireball and fire breath — manage both carefully.

bosses.name: Einhander
bosses.tip: Avoid exploding ceruleum tank blasts — two tanks glow in sequence via line AoE. Dodge the tankbuster.

bosses.name: Magitek Gunship
bosses.tip: Dodge frontal flame attacks and circular bomb patterns. Kill spawned adds and step out of fire puddles.

bosses.name: Midgardsormr
bosses.tip: Wide line attacks, donut AoEs, and untargetable dragon summons throughout. Defeat adds before the enrage charge wipes the party.

bosses.name: Phase 1–2
bosses.tip: Face Ifrit away from the party to avoid Incinerate cleave. Vulcan Burst is a knockback — stay near arena edges.

bosses.name: Phase 3
bosses.tip: An Infernal Nail spawns — destroy it before Hellfire casts or the party wipes.

bosses.name: Phase 4
bosses.tip: Radiant Plume creates centre or edge AoEs that erupt after a delay — read the pattern and reposition.

bosses.name: Phases 1–3
bosses.tip: Stay away from the crumbling arena edges — Landslide is a frontal column that knocks players off. Stomps deal party-wide damage.

bosses.name: Titan's Heart
bosses.tip: The boss becomes invulnerable — burst down the Heart quickly. Rock Tomb encases players; teammates must break them free before Earthen Fury fires.

bosses.name: Final Phase
bosses.tip: Enhanced mechanics: falling rocks, double stomps, repeated Rock Tombs. Maintain positioning and stable healing.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Protect stone pillars — their remaining HP determines Aerial Blast's damage. Kill Razor Plume adds quickly. Hide behind pillars during Mistral Song.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Eye of the Storm restricts the arena to a centre safe zone. Dodge Mistral Shriek (move away) and seek cover for Mistral Song.

bosses.name: Rhitahtyn sas Arvina
bosses.tip: Straightforward solo instance since patch 6.1. Dodge Shield Skewer frontal attacks and Shrapnel Shell ground AoEs — no group coordination required.

bosses.name: Phase 1 — Titan
bosses.tip: Geocrush and Landslide are proximity and frontal AoEs — stay mid-range and dodge. Earthen Fury deals heavy raid damage; heal through it.

bosses.name: Phase 1 — Garuda
bosses.tip: Stay in the arena centre to avoid Aerial Blast donut AoEs. Dodge her point-blank circle AoE placement.

bosses.name: Phase 1 — Ifrit
bosses.tip: Hellfire and scattered circle AoEs — keep moving. Vulcan Burst knocks the tank; position away from the party.

bosses.name: Phase 2 — Ultima Weapon
bosses.tip: Boss resets with new mechanics: homing lasers and multi-directional line AoEs. At ~30% use a tank Limit Break combined with the Neurolink puddle to survive the 'Ultima' wipe cast.

bosses.name: Phases 1–3
bosses.tip: Spread to absorb orbs and build vulnerability stacks on the boss. Tank swap during Double/Triple Spark phases — use Provoke and Shirk to share the damage.

bosses.name: Meteor Phase
bosses.tip: Enter a new room with continuously falling meteors — only tanks intercept them. DPS must immediately destroy the spawning tear before the massive meteor wipes the party.

bosses.name: First & Second Wards
bosses.tip: Defeat dragon adds while Vishap is untargetable. Avoid flame attacks down the arena centre and Earth Shaker frontal cones. Exaflares are untelegraphed line AoEs — keep moving.

bosses.name: Third Ward
bosses.tip: Defeat Vishap before the Knights' Resolve gauge depletes. Earth Shaker now spawns three cones covering the full arena — position in previously safe zones.

bosses.name: Phase 1–2
bosses.tip: Interrupt Eruption before it fires. Dodge Searing Wind (placed on healers) and Radiant Plume circle AoEs.

bosses.name: Phase 3 — Nails
bosses.tip: Four Infernal Nails must all be destroyed before Hellfire — failing wipes the party.

bosses.name: Phase 4
bosses.tip: Crimson Cyclone clones dash across the arena. Seven nails spawn; destroy all before the next Hellfire. Healer maintains Searing Wind positioning throughout.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Protect pillars from Friction and Wicked Wheel. Kill Razor Plumes to preserve pillar HP before Aerial Blast at 50%.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Kill Suparna and Chirada — priority the one with the green healing beam first, then the red damage-boosting beam. Eliminate the Satin Plume (Sleep caster); ignore regular Razor Plumes.

bosses.name: Phases 1–3
bosses.tip: Landslide is a frontal column that knocks players off the arena — critical to dodge. Granite Gaol: DPS stand under Titan while healers run to the edges.

bosses.name: Heart Phase
bosses.tip: Destroy Titan's Heart before the third Weight of the Land or wipe. Manage five-directional Landslide, Weight of the Land, and Bomb Boulder patterns simultaneously.

bosses.name: Mooglesguard
bosses.tip: Kill the healer (Kupli Kipp) and bard (Puksi Piko) first. Pukla Puki (BLM) summons meteors that must be intercepted. Pukna Pako (ROG) delivers tankbusters.

bosses.name: Good King Moggle Mog XII
bosses.tip: The king summons untargetable Mooglesguard for devastating combo attacks. He can revive minions twice using his own HP — burn him down through the add waves.

bosses.name: Dhorme Chimera
bosses.tip: Dragon's Voice: move in (dodge donut AoE). Ram's Voice: move away (dodge point-blank AoE). Same mechanic as Cutter's Cry but in 8-player. Spread for Cacophony electrical AoEs.

bosses.name: Hydra
bosses.tip: Triumvirate is a massive frontal — both tanks must stack to share the damage. Stack close to the boss for Fear Itself to avoid the fear debuff. Avoid Mean Thrash rear AoE.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Casters attack the head; ranged DPS attack the tail. Activate the Elemental Converter before Tidal Wave. Kill Wavespine Sahagins and Gyre Spumes.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Leviathan jumps the ship unpredictably. Wavetooth Sahagins cast dangerous AoE debuffs — kill them quickly. Maintain the head/tail targeting split.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Toad turns players into toads chased by Enkidu. Minimum applies a heavy movement penalty. Confusion effects cause allies to attack each other — manage debuffs carefully.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Waves of adds between arenas — group and burn quickly before moving on.

bosses.name: Phase 3
bosses.tip: Status effects now hit 2–8 players simultaneously. Giga Jump is a targeted leap. Avoid Whirlwinds on the ground while managing stacking debuffs.

bosses.name: Ramuh
bosses.tip: Kill all three Grey Arbiter adds before Judgment Bolt wipes the party. Chaotic Strike immobilises — teammates break it by stepping into the AoE. Manage Rolling Thunder tether pairs.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Shiva cycles Sword/Staff/Unarmed stances. Sword: two tanks share Icebrand. Staff: spread for Hailstorm AoEs. Unarmed: face boss away — auto-attacks cleave.

bosses.name: Ice Soldiers
bosses.tip: Stack the four adds centrally and AoE them down before Diamond Dust. Any survivors when it fires is a wipe.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Arena edges freeze players into boulders — allies destroy them. Permafrost freezes the floor — stop all movement. Icicle Impact v2: dodge into each new telegraph as the previous explodes.

bosses.name: Initial Phase
bosses.tip: Tank bosses separately. Ultros: dodge Megavolt (circle) and Aqua Breath (cone). Typhon: Grind is an untelegraphed tankbuster; knockback cones can push players off the arena.

bosses.name: Imp Phases
bosses.tip: DPS transform into Imps — get hit by Aqua Breath twice for stacks, then punch Typhon to remove his Invigorate buff before Severe Snort fires a massive knockback. Repeat for the second Imp Phase.

bosses.name: Final Phase
bosses.tip: No more transformations. Typhon uses FUNGAH (knockup) and a multi-hit Snort sequence. Ultros spawns tentacles doing line AoEs or cone knockbacks — watch both simultaneously.

bosses.name: Phase 1 — Gilgamesh & Enkidu
bosses.tip: Focus Enkidu while tanks separate the pair — Enkidu heals Gilgamesh with White Wind if left alive. Chickened players run through Mini Tornadoes to clear them.

bosses.name: Phase 2 — Gilgamesh Solo
bosses.tip: Kill three Dragon's Head adds before Dragonstrike hits. Move away during Giga Jump to avoid the Masamune follow-up charge. Move through him during Sword Dance to reduce damage.

bosses.name: Odin
bosses.tip: Position around the perimeter to avoid overlapping Hall of Stone AoEs. Cleanse Slow debuffs promptly. Tank swap on Sanngetall. Defeat Odin before Shin-Zantetsuken at ~15% HP or 6 minutes — it's a guaranteed wipe.

bosses.name: Primal Phases
bosses.tip: Three sequential phases — dodge Garuda's Eye of the Storm, stack for Titan's Tank Purge, and dodge Ifrit's eruption runners and Crimson Cyclone charges.

bosses.name: Aetheric Boon Phases
bosses.tip: Multiple orb phases — walk into designated orbs without letting them collide. Phase 3 requires two players per side to touch both orbs simultaneously or wipe.

bosses.name: Magitek Phases
bosses.tip: Magitek Bits spam lasers while airships strike from cardinal directions — destroy bits from the safe centre zone before impacts land.

bosses.name: Enrage
bosses.tip: Defeat Ultima before the 10-minute timer. Ultima wipes the entire party when the cast completes.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Kill Satin Plume first — it Sleeps the entire party. Position behind pillars for Mistral Song.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Kill Chirada first, then Suparna. Stack centre for Reckoning. Too many destroyed pillars = wipe.

bosses.name: Phases 3–4
bosses.tip: Kill Razor Plumes but keep the Spiny Plume alive — it applies Thermal Low stacks. Tank swap at two stacks (three stacks wipes the tank). Manage whirlwinds from safe corner positions.

bosses.name: Phases 1–2
bosses.tip: Tank at arena edge while party stacks for Weight of the Land. Landslide is lethal — face it away. Three-directional Landslides appear in Phase 2.

bosses.name: Heart Phase
bosses.tip: Destroy the Heart before the third Weight of the Land. Dodge five-directional Landslide and Bomb Boulders simultaneously.

bosses.name: Phase 4
bosses.tip: Kill Granite Gaoler adds while managing all previous mechanics. 10-minute soft enrage via escalating Upheaval knockbacks.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Keep healer with Searing Wind away from the party. Destroy four nails before Hellfire.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Seven nails. Navigate Crimson Cyclone clone dashes. Infernal Fetters link a DPS and off-tank.

bosses.name: Phase 3
bosses.tip: Thirteen nails including one large central nail — may require LB3 to clear all before Hellfire.

bosses.name: Phase 4
bosses.tip: No more nails. Burn Ifrit before the final Hellfire completes — guaranteed wipe.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Learn the king's mechanics at reduced output — cone attacks drain MP; laser charges are telegraphed.

bosses.name: Phases 2–3
bosses.tip: Interrupt the BLM Pukla Puki immediately to prevent a party wipe. Archer Kupqu Kogi has no enmity table — DPS must manage its floor AoEs. The king can revive minions twice.

bosses.name: Enrage
bosses.tip: All enemies must die before the king completes Momento — instant party wipe if it finishes.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Head reflects magic (Veil of the Whorl); tail reflects physical ranged (Mantle of the Whorl) — assign correct damage types. Briny Mirror stacks a healing-range restriction on one tank.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Platform railings break — Body Slam and Spinning Dive knockbacks are now lethal. Stay near the centre.

bosses.name: Phase 3
bosses.tip: Additional enemy spawns. Maintain DPS to avoid soft enrage.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Dodge Thunderstorm AoE patterns. Chaotic Strike immobilises affected players — teammates break it by stepping into the AoE.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Six Grey Arbiter adds spawn — burst them immediately. Rolling Thunder tether pairs must collect lightning orbs to break the connection before damage becomes lethal.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: All Hard mode stances plus new Bow Form. Staff tank gathers Ice Soldier adds centrally for AoE before Diamond Dust at 60 seconds.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Arena edges freeze players into boulders. Thin Ice causes uncontrolled sliding — stop all movement when it appears. Hard enrages at 11 Damage Up stacks.

bosses.name: Bone Dragon
bosses.tip: Kill skeleton adds before they reach the boss — each arrival deals significant damage. The boss must be killed three times before it stays dead.

bosses.name: Thanatos
bosses.tip: The party needs the Astral Realignment buff to damage the boss — tank swaps occur when the buff changes hands. Kill spawning adds throughout.

bosses.name: King Behemoth
bosses.tip: Cover each glowing tower with one ranged DPS or healer. Hide behind meteors during Ecliptic Meteor — standing in the open means instant death.

bosses.name: Phlegethon
bosses.tip: When Ancient Flare casts (~40–50% HP), each group moves immediately to its assigned platform — barriers form to block the damage. Insufficient players causes a wipe.

bosses.name: Scylla
bosses.tip: Direct elemental balls (lightning/ice/flame) to the correct pillars. Stand in water puddles for fire resistance during Ancient Flare.

bosses.name: Glasya Labolas
bosses.tip: Intercept power lines from Clockwork adds. Survive Deathstream and clear the outer platforms in the intermission phase.

bosses.name: Amon
bosses.tip: Kill adds marching toward the boss. Hide behind frozen players during Curtain Call — being caught in the open is lethal.

bosses.name: Xande
bosses.tip: Stand in the radius of golden orbs to safely detonate them. Two intermission meteor phases require careful positioning. Phase 2: float in gravity zones to nullify Ancient Quaga.

bosses.name: Angra Mainyu
bosses.tip: Alternate between red and white AoE floor zones to manage stacking debuffs. Avoid Doom by looking away or standing on lit platforms. Kill four hourglasses during the Roulette mechanic.

bosses.name: Five-headed Dragon
bosses.tip: Manage expanding ice puddles. Kill poison slimes before they silence the raid. Stack on marked players to split damage. During Heatwave all actions deal self-damage — stand completely still.

bosses.name: Cerberus
bosses.tip: A group takes the Mini debuff and gets swallowed to kill stomach adds. Players outside re-chain the boss using tethers while keeping enough members in the raid to prevent a wipe.

bosses.name: Cloud of Darkness
bosses.tip: Tanks targeted with beams kite away from the raid. Stand in comet towers to absorb damage. Eliminate dark clouds before the boss absorbs them for escalating damage stacks.

bosses.name: ADS
bosses.tip: Defeat within four minutes or it self-destructs and wipes the party. Interrupt High Voltage to prevent Paralysis. Keep spawning nodes away from the boss — reaching it heals ADS.

bosses.name: Caduceus
bosses.tip: Keep slime spawns off the boss — they heal Caduceus on contact. At 68% the boss splits into two copies; balance damage evenly between them.

bosses.name: Nodes (selection phase)
bosses.tip: Selectively defeat nodes before the final boss — each removed node eliminates its attack from ADS but buffs remaining nodes. Attacking the Monitoring Node starts a 10-minute enrage timer.

bosses.name: ADS (final boss)
bosses.tip: ADS inherits all attacks and resistances of surviving nodes. Power escalates at 75/50/25% HP based on which nodes were left alive.

bosses.name: Platforming Only
bosses.tip: No boss — this turn is a jump-pad maze through trash mobs (Mantis, Dreadguard, Golems, Slugs, Aurelia). Unique in FFXIV in that it awards no tomestone for completion.

bosses.name: Clockwork Dreadnaught
bosses.tip: Hits extremely hard — pop defensive cooldowns and burn it down before it consumes adds and amplifies its own damage.

bosses.name: Clockwork Knight
bosses.tip: Reflects all magic damage — only physical DPS can attack safely.

bosses.name: Clockwork Soldier
bosses.tip: Stoneskin negates all physical damage — only magical DPS can attack.

bosses.name: Spinner-rook
bosses.tip: POX reduces players' maximum HP by ~1,000 per hit — face it away from the raid during its cast.

bosses.name: Clockwork Bug
bosses.tip: Drains player HP while self-healing — priority target for AoE elimination.

bosses.name: Twintania
bosses.tip: Fireball is a stack marker — coordinate to split damage. Conflagration domes stun and must be destroyed by allies. Divebombs require precise arena positioning. Twister is a proximity landmine — keep moving. Hatch orbs chase marked players toward designated safe zones.

bosses.name: Rafflesia
bosses.tip: Thorn Whip fires spread tethers — break them by increasing distance. Briary Growth spawns movement-restricting puddles. Kill Dark Matter Slugs and Acidic Honey adds while managing stacking poison debuffs.

bosses.name: Melusine
bosses.tip: Use petrified Renaud adds as line-of-sight shields against Cursed Shriek. Cursed Voice must NOT be shielded — distinguish between the two debuffs carefully or you die.

bosses.name: The Avatar
bosses.tip: Manage four biotowers around the arena — allow controlled charging to prevent the boss from gaining buffs or enraging. Phase 2 adds Ballistic Missile stack markers. Phase 3 Allagan Field: affected players separate from the group to avoid reflecting damage onto allies.

bosses.name: Nael deus Darnus
bosses.tip: Phase 1: position comets carefully to avoid chaining explosions. Phase 2: three golems absorb projectiles — use them to intercept. Phase 3: tower knockbacks and debuff mechanics. Phase 4: simultaneous dragon attacks with elemental status effects.

bosses.name: Imdugud
bosses.tip: Five-phase fight with combining mechanics. Manage Wild Charge stack positioning and Erratic Blaster shield mechanics as the arena progressively shrinks. Handle add spawns in intermission phases.

bosses.name: Kaliya
bosses.tip: Resonate is a shared tankbuster cleave — both tanks must stack for it. Off-tank provoking during Secondary Head is critical to prevent lethal damage. Phase 2: three nodes must stay separated. Phase 3: tether mechanics restrict movement.

bosses.name: Phoenix
bosses.tip: Brand of Purgatory debuff must be passed between players before it kills. Blackfire landmines — place safely around the arena. Kill Bennu adds before they revive and buff each other. Fountain of Fire: designated players absorb tether damage while managing Cloak of Death stacks.

bosses.name: Bahamut Prime
bosses.tip: Flare Breath is a frontal cleave — face away from the party. Megaflare: stack markers with varying patterns. Earth Shaker: two marked players move to arena edges while others stack behind the boss. Tempest Wing tethers splash damage onto nearby allies.

bosses.name: Teraflare
bosses.tip: Requires a tank LB3 and standing in the Neurolink puddle to survive. 14-minute hard enrage. Akh Morn gains additional hits with each use in the final phase — escalating mitigation required.

bosses.name: Towering Oliphant
bosses.tip: Trunk Tawse is a telegraphed tankbuster — use cooldowns. Prehistoric Trumpet deals party-wide damage. Rock of Ages knocks players back — position to roll toward open space.

bosses.name: Ser Yuhelmeric
bosses.tip: Keep adds away from the boss — red-weapon adds buff his damage, blue-weapon adds grant haste. Brain Drain is party-wide damage; Death Spiral is a donut AoE — move into the boss hitbox. Kill adds before they reach Yuhelmeric.

bosses.name: Opinicus
bosses.tip: Golden Talons is a telegraphed tankbuster. Alpine Draft fires line AoEs at random players — spread to reduce chaining. Whirling Gaol pushes players inward; use environmental rubble as cover against Freefall landing AoEs.

bosses.name: Raskovnik
bosses.tip: Acid Rain places AoE circles on all players — spread out immediately. Sweet Scent spawns adds that must be killed before they reach the boss and buff Flower Devour's circle AoE.

bosses.name: Myath
bosses.tip: Primordial Roar spawns coloured blobs — red blobs require stacking, blue blobs require spread. Kill the third blob type the moment it appears or it buffs all remaining adds.

bosses.name: Tioman
bosses.tip: Abyssic Buster is a wide frontal cone — stay at the flanks. Chaos Blast fires multidirectional lines. At 50% HP Tioman becomes invincible and her wings separate into destructible targets — destroy both while surviving Heavensfall cluster attacks.

bosses.name: Rangda
bosses.tip: Electric Cachexia targets players outside melee range — stay close. Transfer the Prey debuff to arena pillars before it expires. Kill Leyak adds as they spawn.

bosses.name: Gyascutus
bosses.tip: Proximity Pyre is a point-blank circle — move out. Ashen Ouroboros is a donut AoE — move in close. Crippling Blow is a tankbuster; Body Slam knocks players back — stay away from arena edges.

bosses.name: Nidhogg
bosses.tip: Hot Tail and Hot Wing cover the rear or flanks in large directional lines — position accordingly. Cauterize is a diving AoE; dodge perpendicular to his path. At ~50% HP Massacre begins — adds spawn around the arena while Horrid Roar stack markers require the party to group.

bosses.name: Ser Adelphel Brightblade
bosses.tip: Defeat the three low-health adds before engaging. Holiest of Holy is unavoidable room-wide damage. At ~30% HP Adelphel knocks everyone back and charges the arena leaving light orb trails — avoid the trails and dodge his crash landing on a targeted player.

bosses.name: Ser Grinnaux de Bruys
bosses.tip: Hyperdimensional Slash creates AoE lines that leave persistent Aetherial Tear puddles — avoid both the cast and the puddles. Faith Unmoving is a room-wide knockback — position away from the tears or you will be pushed into one.

bosses.name: Ser Charibert
bosses.tip: Holy Chain links two players — run apart to break the tether before Altar Pyre fires its room-wide blast. Heavensflame drops rings on the floor. At 50% HP Charibert summons Dawn Knight and Dusk Knight adds alongside Holy Flames that must be destroyed quickly.

bosses.name: Demon Tome
bosses.tip: Disclosure forces every player to move to the boss's rear instantly or die — watch for the cast. Words of Winter causes directional sliding. Dark Blizzard III is a circle AoE targeting random players.

bosses.name: Byblos
bosses.tip: Byblos becomes invincible at the arena centre — pick up tethers from defeated adds and drag them into the boss to break the shield. Gale Cut is frontal; Tail Swipe covers the rear — stay at the flanks.

bosses.name: The Everliving Bibliotaph
bosses.tip: Three Void Summon phases at roughly 85%, 55%, and 25% HP — stand on illuminated platforms (1–3 players per platform matching the light count) or voidsent adds spawn. Avoid purple void spark AoEs that leave stacking Vulnerability Up.

bosses.name: Regula van Hydrus
bosses.tip: Magitek Spread is a 270-degree conal — reposition to the rear. He stuns random party members before firing untelegraphed shots. Destroy turrets before they self-destruct and deal party-wide damage.

bosses.name: Harmachis
bosses.tip: Weighing of the Heart cycles between four forms — Anti-Naga form triggers a petrification gaze (look away); Anti-Machina form fires missile stack markers. Adapt positioning to each form change.

bosses.name: Lahabrea & Igeyorhm
bosses.tip: Health equalises between both bosses — keep damage balanced. Dark Fire II requires spread; End of Days is a line stack requiring the party to group. After one dies the survivor merges into Ascian Prime.

bosses.name: Ascian Prime
bosses.tip: Universal Manipulation inflicts five simultaneous debuffs — resolve each in sequence. Dualstar combines fire and ice orbs that collide; use positional awareness to avoid the combined explosion. Ancient Eruption drops targeted AoE circles — keep moving.

bosses.name: Nunyenunc
bosses.tip: The boss vanishes into mist — locate and destroy Nunyenunc's Shadow before it reforms. Kill spawned feathers quickly; they explode on contact and inflict stacking Vulnerability Up.

bosses.name: Canu Vanu
bosses.tip: Morrowcloud inflicts a persistent Bleed — Esuna promptly. Sacred Totem marks players who drop totems; move all totems out of the purple circle before Totem Chant completes or they become immune-granting adds.

bosses.name: Waukkeon
bosses.tip: Kill all Divine Gale adds before the final Turbine knockback, then stack near the boss with the largest open area behind you to avoid falling off the platform edge. Tornadoes spawn periodically and deal contact damage.

bosses.name: Phantom Ray
bosses.tip: Double Sever fans two conal AoEs directly forward and behind — stay at the flanks. Rapid Sever is a heavy tankbuster; use defensive cooldowns.

bosses.name: Minotaur
bosses.tip: 111-Tonze Swing is a 360-degree cleave with knockback — maintain distance or use knockback immunity. When 1111-Tonze Swipe casts, click the Biomass Incubator tubes to spawn adds that interrupt the room-wide attack.

bosses.name: The Curator
bosses.tip: Kill Clockwork Alarum adds immediately on spawn. Aetherochemical Explosive is a heavy DoT — healers Esuna at once. Floor tiles light up in patterns before exploding — reposition to unlighted sections.

bosses.name: Rose Garden
bosses.tip: Spinning breath attacks rotate clockwise or counterclockwise — keep moving in the opposite direction. Destroy Rose Hip balloon adds quickly before they explode for raid-wide damage.

bosses.name: Queen Hawk
bosses.tip: Bees at the arena edges fire unmarked column AoEs — watch the perimeter, not just the boss. Ally gathers two bee groups for a double unmarked column AoE — move to the centre. Kill Knight Hawk adds tethered to the boss before their channel escalates.

bosses.name: Belladonna
bosses.tip: Large room-wide AoE requires standing next to the boss to survive. Look away during Frond Fatale to avoid being charmed into Bulb AoE puddles that stack magic vulnerability. Kill summoned adds quickly.

bosses.name: Ghrah Luminary
bosses.tip: Corruption tethers mark players with Prey — run to one of the passive circling mobs to transfer the debuff before the cast finishes. Transferred mobs turn aggressive but have minimal HP.

bosses.name: 8th Order Patriarch Be Gu
bosses.tip: Room-wide AoEs open floor fissures. Pull Corrupted Gel adds onto aether plumes to seal them. Destroy Alchemy Engine adds immediately — they tether to the boss and grant a damage buff.

bosses.name: Progenitrix & Progenitor
bosses.tip: Progenitrix: destroy Grey bombs around the perimeter immediately. After she falls, Progenitor summons Remedy bombs that slowly tether to Grey bombs — hit Remedy bombs to push them away and create space to destroy Grey bombs safely.

bosses.name: Zuro Roggo
bosses.tip: Frog Song transforms two players into frogs while continuous water attacks land — manage the debuffs carefully. Odious Croak is a persistent frontal cone; Toy Hammer is an untelegraphed tankbuster that inflicts Concussion.

bosses.name: Ziggy
bosses.tip: Jittering Jounce tethers and marks a player — hide behind summoned rocks to avoid the damage. Mystic Light is a point-blank AoE from the rocks; Jittering Glare is a telegraphed frontal cone targeting a random player.

bosses.name: Calcabrina
bosses.tip: Six smaller dolls open the fight — keep them grouped for AoE cleave. Look away from Terrifying Glance to avoid Confusion. When Brace activates, three barriers appear and the boss is only vulnerable from the empty side — reposition quickly.

bosses.name: Achamoth
bosses.tip: Neura Squamae spawns ghost copies of players at their current positions that cast Enthrallment frontal cones — move away from where you stood when the copies form. Toxic Squamae creates a tethered cloud leaving persistent puddles; drag it to a safe corner.

bosses.name: Winged Lion
bosses.tip: Ancient Holy makes the boss untargetable — destroy the Arcane Sphere immediately or the phase resets. Ancient Stone and Ancient Aero drop expanding orbs that must be detonated away from the group.

bosses.name: Kuribu
bosses.tip: Reverse flips healing effects to harmful — in phase 2, Regen becomes a damaging ground AoE and Cure IV becomes proximity damage. Watch for the Reverse cast to know when each spell inverts. Decoy spawns adds whose behaviour changes with the boss's current stance.

bosses.name: Chieftain Moglin
bosses.tip: Kill moogle adds quickly and knock their corpses out of purple revival circles — revived adds return at full HP. Captain Mogsun tethers to the boss and makes him invincible while alive; prioritise Mogsun above all else.

bosses.name: Poqhiraj
bosses.tip: Arena walls are destructible and expose electrified pools when broken — avoid breaking them unnecessarily. Cloud Call pulses damage on a marked player — move them away from the group. Charge attacks knock back; brace against intact walls.

bosses.name: Hraesvelgr
bosses.tip: Hallowed Wings cleaves one arena half — read left or right and reposition immediately. Hallowed Dive fires line AoEs followed by moving circles along the path. Akh Morn is a stack marker — group tightly. Diamond Storm freezes the floor; slide into safe zones rather than stopping.

bosses.name: Battle Coeurl & Sanguine Sirens
bosses.tip: A coeurl spawns tethered to the healer applying a healing-down and damage-up debuff — kill it immediately. Dodge cannon fire from offshore while managing the enemy waves.

bosses.name: Ymir
bosses.tip: Megavolt marks players with red flags — step into slime spots for lightning immunity. Flash Freeze makes the arena slippery and creates icebergs. Blanket Thunder fires lightning tethers between players — increase distance to break them.

bosses.name: Grand Storm Marshal Slafyrsyn & Mistbeard
bosses.tip: Phase 2: Poison Mist inflicts lethal poison — locate chests containing blue antidote potions immediately. Bullet Hell is a heavy room-wide AoE; Grenado Shot applies a crippling debuff — Esuna without delay. Firesand Kegs can be attacked to reposition them.

bosses.name: Nuzal Hueloc
bosses.tip: Airstones tether to turrets — destroy the turrets first. Hot Air launches players airborne; position directly under the boss to bring it back to earth. Air Raid is unavoidable party-wide damage.

bosses.name: Dotoli Ciloc
bosses.tip: On High is a party-wide knockback — stand against barriers to avoid falling into spike pits. Swiftfeather makes the next On Low (frontal cleave) nearly instant and impossible to sidestep. Stormcoming hits barriers and spawns persistent wind AoE zones.

bosses.name: Tozol Huatotl
bosses.tip: Hawk resolves as either a stack or a spread marker — read the indicator and react immediately. Summon Garuda calls an untargetable Garuda that fires room-wide AoEs with safe zones; green crystal markers require spread positioning simultaneously.

bosses.name: Demon of the Tome
bosses.tip: Watch for narrow AoE markers near the arena edge — a large follow-up erupts shortly after. Primarily a positioning check; stay mobile and track all ground indicators.

bosses.name: Liquid Flame
bosses.tip: Ferrofluid marks players with + or − symbols matching the boss's own marker — same signs move close together, opposite signs move apart. Slosh tethers a player who must run away. Seal of Night and Day sends players to matching floor sigils.

bosses.name: Strix
bosses.tip: Check Out spawns three coloured circles: white grants Levitation (avoids the stun from Quakes), black grants Leaden (prevents knockback from Tornados), green toggles Imp status (imps take extra damage from Thunder III). Manage the correct buff for each mechanic cycle. Ecliptic Meteor at the end requires hiding behind rocks.

bosses.name: Magitek Predator
bosses.tip: Magitek Ray is a linear AoE — reposition to the sides. Magitek Missile marks players with proximity explosions — move away from allies before detonation. Kill spawning adds before they add further AoE pressure.

bosses.name: Armored Weapon
bosses.tip: Do not take any actions or movement during Dynamic Sensory Jammer — any action deals damage to yourself. Launcher reduces current HP by 50% party-wide. Destroy Magitek Bit adds in the checkerboard pattern and kill Distress Beacon reinforcements quickly.

bosses.name: The Griffin
bosses.tip: Lionshead summons destructible swords — destroy the central sword to prevent a devastating explosion. Look away during Flash Powder to avoid the stun. Restraint Collar immobilises the healer; maintain proximity. Sanguine Blade is a heavy cleave — tank faces the boss away from the party.

bosses.name: The Leightonward
bosses.tip: Spore Sac spawns untargetable sacs that erupt in AoE patterns — subsequent casts add larger proximity sacs. Excretion inflicts Heavy on a single player; Inflammable Fumes is unavoidable party-wide damage.

bosses.name: Gowrow
bosses.tip: Volcanic Howl is unavoidable but grants the boss a Damage Up buff — all subsequent attacks except Volcanic Howl inflict an uncleansable Infirmity debuff. Ripper Claw is a dodgeable frontal cleave that spawns tornadoes when the boss is buffed. Tail Smash covers the rear with knockback.

bosses.name: Lava Scorpion
bosses.tip: Molten Silk is a 270-degree close-range cleave with a safe zone directly behind — stay behind the boss at all times. Hiss summons 2–4 scorpion adds that create lava puddles; kill them to preserve movement space. Deadly Thrust is a single-target tankbuster — use cooldowns.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Prelude to Slaughter creates telegraphed AoE sequences with safe gaps — read the pattern. Surpanakha fires a linear AoE toward a marked player. Pillars of Heaven is raid-wide damage with knockback risk — maintain arena position.

bosses.name: Phase 2 & Ultimate
bosses.tip: Swift Slaughter marks several players with white icons — spread immediately. At 60% HP Chandrahas summons adds that must be killed before their casts complete. Bloodlust stacks on the boss as a soft enrage — maintain steady damage output.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Activate the shield device during Cetacean Rage to protect the platform. Fire harpoon cannons after defeating the initial adds to chain Bismarck and expose the Chitin Carapace — the party must stand on his back to deal damage, incurring a minor DoT.

bosses.name: Phases 2–3
bosses.tip: Phase 2: separate the two sanuwa adds to prevent vulnerability buff stacking. Phase 3: during thunder weather, killing Vapor Bubble adds triggers lightning strikes on random players — wait for rain phase before destroying them. The platform has a health bar — keep it above ~24% or the raid wipes.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Lightning Storm marks four players — spread out immediately. Ascalon's Mercy fires multiple line AoEs with gaps between them. At 80% HP untargetable Knights of the Round attack; at 55% The Dragon's Eye activates a gaze — look away to avoid Terror.

bosses.name: Phase 2 — Knights
bosses.tip: Each knight has a distinct mechanic: Charibert/Hermenost use tower circles; Zephirin casts Sacred Cross (DPS check); Vellguine charges columns. Clearing the knights quickly reduces the damage of Ultimate End at the end of this phase.

bosses.name: Phase 3
bosses.tip: Thordan returns weakened — simply defeat him. Use this window to top the party and restore resources before any remaining DoT effects expire.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Fiendish Rage marks a player with arrows — the rest of the party stacks to share damage. Ratzon marks ~6 players with small AoEs — spread out. Ain is a 180-degree frontal blast — stack behind Sephirot to avoid it.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Kill the Storm of Words add immediately — Revelation is an instant party wipe. Pillar of Mercy circles knock players back; stand adjacent to the interior edge to avoid falling off the platform. Gevurah/Chesed cover half the arena — stand in the matching-buff zone.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Hot Wings and Hot Tail cover large directional swaths — read the telegraph and find the remaining safe zone. Deafening Bellow is unavoidable party damage cast twice in sequence.

bosses.name: Phase 2 — Adds
bosses.tip: Strict DPS check: defeat all adds before Nidhogg counterattacks. Tank the middle add with its cone facing away; position the two side adds' cones outward toward the arena walls.

bosses.name: Phases 3–4
bosses.tip: Humanoid form: Geirskogul fires line AoEs; Akh Morn is a tankbuster. Phase 4 dragon form: Akh Morn becomes multi-hit — stack and stay stacked until all hits resolve. Fireballs erupt in plus patterns. Hot Wings and Hot Tail now alternate rapidly.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Thunder II is a frontal cone — sidestep. Thunder III is a donut AoE — move into the boss. Aero II knocks back from the arena centre. Daughter attacks fire straight-line projectiles from the arena edges — dodge toward clear zones.

bosses.name: Demiurges Phase
bosses.tip: All players receive a ticking Eternal Doom debuff — defeat all three adds within 80 seconds. Kill The Second (White Mage) first to remove its healing; look away from its gaze attack to avoid Confusion.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Quasar tethers to scales causing directional knockback — the heavier side fires, so balance player positioning. Sin & Punishment pairs ring mechanics requiring stack coordination. Arena edges become lethal fall zones.

bosses.name: Phases 1–2
bosses.tip: Platform quadrants fall counterclockwise — maintain safe footing. Biting Halberd is a 270-degree frontal — position directly behind Zurvan. Ciclicle is a donut AoE — move close. Tail End is a centre-wide AoE — move to the edges.

bosses.name: Adds Phase
bosses.tip: Three waves spawn. Kill the Execrated Wit caster first — Meracydian Meteor is an instant party wipe if it completes. Look away from the Execrated Wile gaze attack to avoid Fear.

bosses.name: Phase 3
bosses.tip: Broken Seal assigns fire/ice debuffs — soak matching-colour meteors. Tyrfing gains one additional hit each cast — escalate mitigation accordingly. Infinite Fire & Ice tethers paired players who must stay close.

bosses.name: Phase 1 — Dragonfly
bosses.tip: The Seeing X places barriers on three sides — avoid them. Tapasya is a triple-hit frontal cone; Warlord Shell is a damage-absorbing shield that must be broken through with sustained DPS.

bosses.name: Phases 2–3 — Scorpion & Ultimate
bosses.tip: Liberation: stack behind the boss, then dodge his charge. Swift Liberation marks four players — move to assigned waymarks. Phase 3 adds Spirit Gana and Moon Gana adds that must die before Falling Laughter casts or the party wipes.

bosses.name: Phases 4–8
bosses.tip: Beetle phase: Pillars of Heaven is a raid-wide knockback. Rose of Conviction tethers an orb — use ranged attacks to manage it. Phases 5–8 repeat earlier stance patterns at escalating damage — maintain mitigation rotation and beat the soft enrage from accumulating Bloodlust stacks.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Use the Magitek Field Generator during Cetacean Rage to protect the island. After firing cannons board Bismarck — Turbulence stacks while on his back; dismount before reaching 3 stacks or take lethal damage.

bosses.name: Phase 2 — Sanuwa
bosses.tip: Players receive Will of the Wind or Will of the Water — attack the opposite-coloured sanuwa to avoid damage reflection. Both must die within a tight timer or the raid wipes.

bosses.name: Phase 3
bosses.tip: Kill Nat'maii Vundu add before boarding. Weather cycles between wind and water AoE patterns. Jump off Bismarck manually when he shakes to avoid death. Use melee Limit Break on the Corona target for optimal damage.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: The Dragon's Gaze is a room-wide gaze — look away or suffer Hysteria. Heavenly Heel is a heavy tankbuster. The Dragon's Rage is a stack marker — group up for shared damage. Lightning Storm marks players — spread immediately.

bosses.name: Phase 2 — Knights (5 sub-phases)
bosses.tip: Burning Chains tether pairs — run apart. Conviction towers require occupation. Hiemal Storm marks five players for frost patches. Spiral Pierce charges at unmarked players. Holy Meteor circles must be destroyed. Clearing knights quickly reduces Ultimate End damage.

bosses.name: Phase 3 — Reunion
bosses.tip: Ser Zephirin's Sacred Cross tethers to Thordan making him invulnerable — kill other knights first. Conviction towers now combine with simultaneous gaze and knockback mechanics across five escalating sub-phases. Hard enrage follows the final round.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Ein Sof growing circles inflict Vulnerability stacks — move out immediately. Chesed is a no-cast-bar tankbuster. Fiendish Rage stack markers arrive with knockback debuffs on the healer and DPS — pre-coordinate stacking positions.

bosses.name: Adds Phase
bosses.tip: Two Cochma and four waves of Binah adds spawn while the boss charges a Limit Break. Tanks split responsibilities by add type — all deaths trigger party-wide Genesis damage.

bosses.name: Phase 3
bosses.tip: Force Field splits the party by buff type for half-arena Gevurah/Chesed attacks — position on the matching side. Fiendish Wail towers deal massive damage if empty — assign in advance. Da'at sends five circles with four interceptable tethers — coordinate intercept roles. Malkuth knockback spawns adds including a dangerous caster.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Cauterize dives across the arena — dodge perpendicular to the path. Horrid Roar (Sky/Floor) drops AoE puddles on random players. Hot Wing and Hot Tail cover large directional areas — constantly read safe-zone changes.

bosses.name: Phase 2 — Adds
bosses.tip: Kill Shadow Brobinyak first (applies physical vulnerability), then Shadow Falak (magic vulnerability). Shadow Dragon cannot be tanked — kite it until the other two are dead. Complete within ~90 seconds or a raid-wide wipe triggers.

bosses.name: Phases 3–5
bosses.tip: Phase 3: Soul Tether fires interceptable purple tethers at healers — tanks step in front. Phase 4: four Darkdragon towers must be occupied simultaneously. Phase 5: Akh Morn gains one hit per cast (starting at 4); Bitter Hate stacks on the main tank — swap at 7 stacks. Hard enrage at 11 minutes.

bosses.name: Phase 1
bosses.tip: Aion Teleos summons clones that memorise attack patterns — they all fire simultaneously; track them carefully. Gnosis is a massive knockback that can be resisted with defensive cooldowns. Arms of Wisdom is a knockback tankbuster.

bosses.name: Demiurges Phase
bosses.tip: The First (Paladin) has directional parry mechanics — attack from the correct flank. Kill The Second (White Mage) first; it heals allies and its gaze causes Confusion. Failure causes Zombification inflicting uncontrolled attacks on allies.

bosses.name: Phase 3
bosses.tip: Quasar tethers to scales — the heavier side fires a directional knockback; balance player count on each side. Dischordant Cleansing requires pairing opposite-colour debuff markers. Cintamani deals unavoidable party damage three times in rapid succession — use mitigation.

bosses.name: Caged Phase & Phase 1
bosses.tip: Zurvan destroys arena quadrants sequentially while chained — stay in surviving sections. Wave Cannon is an unmarked line AoE on a player — sidestepping required. Demonic Dive with Cool Flame splits healing responsibilities.

bosses.name: Phase 2
bosses.tip: Southern Cross fires delayed AoE explosions requiring the group to rotate around the arena. Biting Halberd covers 270 degrees — stay directly behind the boss. Tail End is arena-wide from centre — move to the very edge.

bosses.name: Adds Phase & Phase 3
bosses.tip: Kill the Wit caster first — Meracydian Meteor is an instant wipe. Phase 3: Broken Seal assigns fire/ice — soak the matching meteor colour. Tyrfing gains one additional hit per cast — assign escalating tank cooldowns. Infinite Fire & Ice tethers require paired players to stay close.

bosses.name: Cetus
bosses.tip: Hydrocore separates alliances with barriers and spawns adds — each alliance handles its own group. Body Slam targets players with circle AoEs; Immersion deals party-wide damage with water orbs.

bosses.name: Forward Port Ventilator
bosses.tip: Groups must stand on buttons on either side of the arena to suppress the boss while killing adds. Destroy The Pagan's Knots to prevent lethal poison clouds.

bosses.name: Irminsul & Sawtooth
bosses.tip: The pair are permanently tethered — keep them separated to prevent damage amplification. Hide behind Irminsul during Shockwave Stomp. Sawtooth's Feeds summons adds that cause parasite infections on contact.

bosses.name: Cuchulainn
bosses.tip: All players begin with a permanent Bleeding debuff. Bile Below is an instant-kill floor hazard — use nearby platforms for safety. Idol of Impurity creates towers that stack Bleeding; Void Pact spawns Stoneskin adds.

bosses.name: Echidna
bosses.tip: Petrifaction is a gaze attack — look away. During the add phase the boss separates into three targets requiring tank management; keep them spaced to prevent vulnerability stacking. Sickle Strike is a heavy tankbuster.

bosses.name: Arachne Eve
bosses.tip: Widow's Kiss pulls players to the centre — reposition away from web hazards. Players caught in webs during the puzzle phase must be freed by allies. Fond Affeared is a gaze attack — look away.

bosses.name: Forgall
bosses.tip: Players must obtain a specific debuff before Mega Death fires or face instant death — read the required debuff and apply it. Tower mechanics require players to stand on pillars; Evil Mist and Hell Wind are unavoidable room-wide damage.

bosses.name: Ozma
bosses.tip: The boss cycles through Sphere, Pyramid, and Cube forms — each has distinct mechanics and AoE shapes. Ozmashade is a mandatory DPS check phase. The arena edge is lethal; maintain arena positioning throughout all transitions.

bosses.name: Calofisteri
bosses.tip: Bijou adds spawn and buff Calofisteri's attacks — kill them as they appear. Your facing direction relative to the boss affects knockback direction — position the boss away from arena edges.

bosses.name: Deathgaze Hollow
bosses.tip: Void Death pulls players toward the centre — resist and reposition. Void Aero III uses proximity damage near walls — move to the centre. The boss alternates sides and creates knockback patterns.

bosses.name: Ferdiad Hollow
bosses.tip: Wormhole is a tether-based positioning puzzle — coordinate alliance positions before it resolves. At 60% HP adds spawn with petrification gaze attacks — look away from affected adds immediately.

bosses.name: Proto Ultima
bosses.tip: Destroy Allagan Dreadnaught and Proto Bit adds during DPS phases. Magitek Ray telegraphs a laser grid — identify safe columns. Supernova is an enrage cast — maintain damage output throughout.

bosses.name: Scathach
bosses.tip: Shadespin creates a wing-shaped hourglass AoE — stand in the narrow safe zone between the wings. Shadow Links grabs moving players — stop all movement on application. At 50% HP a cocoon phase with tower mechanics begins.

bosses.name: Diabolos
bosses.tip: Look away during Nightmare to avoid the sleep gaze. Phase 2: defeat Lifegates to expose Diabolos. Phase 3 (Hollow): Hollow Camisado is a lethal tankbuster requiring full mitigation. Portal mechanics require killing adds inside the portal before returning.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Fist of the Father

bosses.name: Faust
bosses.tip: Off-tank manages spawning adds while DPS focuses Faust. Keep adds away from the raid — their cleave attacks hit anything nearby.

bosses.name: The Oppressor
bosses.tip: Phase 1: Hydrothermal Missile drops several missiles on a marked player; Resin Bomb places circle AoEs under four players — spread. Phase 2: a second Oppressor spawns — keep them separated. Kill both simultaneously during Self Destruct or wipe. During 3000-Onze Missile, kill the Alarum underneath the laser beam to reduce its damage.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Cuff of the Father

bosses.name: Enemy Waves
bosses.tip: Kill in priority order: Boomtype Magitek Gobwalkers (red suits), then Jagd Dolls, then Gordian Hardhelms/Hardminds, then Gordian Soldiers and Snipers. Bombs have wide explosion radii — use the mountable blue magitek robot to drag bombs away from the raid.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Arm of the Father

bosses.name: Living Liquid — Human & Hand forms
bosses.tip: Human form: Protean Wave fires outward conal AoEs — spread around the boss. Sluice marks four players who must spread while additional circles land. Hand form: Wash Away knocks all players randomly; off-tank picks up the Liquid Limb add and positions away from the raid.

bosses.name: Living Liquid — Tornado & Final
bosses.tip: Tornado form: boss is invincible — kill Gear and Piston Lubricant adds before they reach the arena edge. Magnetic tether debuffs: red + players stack together, blue − players spread apart. Final form repeats all previous mechanics — maintain the Cascade tank swap at 4–5 stacks of Blunt Resistance Down.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Burden of the Father

bosses.name: The Manipulator — Leg Phases
bosses.tip: Leg 1: blue orbs float toward players — tanks absorb most; DPS/healers take 1–2 max. Leg 2: three laser adds fire orange lines — at least two must be intercepted by another player. Kill three Jagd Dolls quickly; four stacks of their debuff is instant death.

bosses.name: The Manipulator — Final Phase
bosses.tip: All prior mechanics return simultaneously. Judgement Nisi places blue and red five-stack debuffs on both healers. Discoid drops AoE markers on four players twice, followed by a tankbuster — maintain mitigation throughout.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Fist of the Son

bosses.name: Ratfinx Twinkledinks
bosses.tip: When the boss transforms and applies 4 Concussion stacks to the main tank, off-tank provokes immediately to intercept the devastating follow-up. Red puddle transforms players into gorillas — use the knockback ability to push bombs into corners. Violet puddle transforms players into birds to survive the multi-hit Boost ground pound.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Cuff of the Son

bosses.name: Blaster → Brawler → Swindler → Vortexer
bosses.tip: Blaster: spread in a line so each charging copy hits only one player. Brawler: single drill is a proximity line AoE, single laser solos the tank, double laser requires stacking. Swindler: stand on the floor elevation opposite your high/low debuff. Vortexer: freeze water sprites with Shiva ice rings to create a boulder for Ultra Flash protection — Ultra Flash wipes the party without it.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Arm of the Son

bosses.name: Quickthinx Allthoughts
bosses.tip: Cage mechanics send players to four distinct corners — Red: stand still (Pyretic); Purple: kill the Alarum before the timer expires; White: avoid Deep Freeze wall attacks while fighting a Gobwalker; Green: stand in the gas vent. Outside: kill Panzer-Doll and Sturm-Doll adds; interrupt Sturm-Doll's Kugelblitz. Destroy True Heart adds during the Shanoa phase before they heal the boss.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Burden of the Son

bosses.name: Onslaughter
bosses.tip: Perpetual Ray applies magic vulnerability — tank swap after each cast. Mega Beam is a heavy frontal with knockback. Discoid sends tethered orbs toward players — tanks absorb the hits.

bosses.name: Brawler & Vortexer / Swindler & Blaster
bosses.tip: Both pairs are fought simultaneously. Swindler's Arithmeticks debuffs require standing on the opposite floor elevation. Enumeration circles require exactly the correct number of players inside — coordinate assignments. Brawler's single/double laser pattern requires the tank to solo or the party to stack accordingly.

bosses.name: Brute Justice
bosses.tip: Double Rocket Punch is a shared tankbuster — stack both tanks together. Long Needle drops four AoE markers plus a stack marker simultaneously. Apocalyptic Ray is a persistent rotating laser — move behind the boss. Super Jump targets a random player with splash; Flarethrower is a frontal cone. J Kick is unavoidable raid-wide damage from arena centre.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Eyes of the Creator

bosses.name: Refurbisher 0
bosses.tip: Off-tank moves Power Generators adjacent to fallen enemies to revive and then kill them. Lava consumes quadrants NW→NE→SW→SE in sequence — keep adds clear. Scrap Burst marks players with meteors; hide behind the meteors to avoid the Bleeding debuff. Scrapline is a 270-degree frontal — move behind the boss.

bosses.name: Full Metal Faust Phase
bosses.tip: Refurbisher 0 becomes invulnerable and a Full Metal Faust spawns NW with proximity damage. Off-tank kites it to the SE quadrant (last safe zone) while the group kills it before lava reaches it — Faust contacting lava is an instant raid wipe.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Breath of the Creator

bosses.name: Lamebrix Strikebocks
bosses.tip: Three arena-centre buttons trigger spike, falling ball, and side-spike effects as the boss jumps to them. Single Charge is either a close circle (move out) or a donut (move in) — read the telegraph. When the boss jumps to the map end, defeat the Steamroller before it reaches him. Prey targets a player with a proximity line AoE — move away from the party.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Heart of the Creator

bosses.name: Cruise Chaser — Phase 1
bosses.tip: Optical Sight varies: green circles spread out, giant centre circle moves outward, clockwise circles wait in the middle then move to cleared arc. Stand behind round objects during Propeller Wind to avoid Confusion. GA-100 targets the off-tank with heavy splash — group distance reduces party damage.

bosses.name: Cruise Chaser — Transformation
bosses.tip: At ~50% HP the boss becomes untargetable and transforms — click one of four ducts within the time limit or the entire party wipes. Phase 2: Plasma Shield requires positioning in front of the shield to deal damage. Eternal Darkness is room-wide bleed — any surviving Lapis Lazuli Orbs cause a wipe; destroy them immediately.

dungeons.name: Alexander: The Soul of the Creator

bosses.name: Alexander Prime — Phases 1 & 2
bosses.tip: Sacrament fires cross-pattern line AoEs — dodge to the diagonal safe spots. Blazing Scourge marks two players with delayed explosions — spread before detonation. Phase 2 waves: six Lanner adds, then two General's Might (tank separately, face away), then four General's Wing. Judgement at the end requires a Tank Limit Break or the party instantly wipes.

bosses.name: Alexander Prime — Phase 3
bosses.tip: Temporal Stasis freezes all players for ~9 seconds — pre-position for the mechanic that resolves during the freeze. Plaint of Solidarity is a stack marker; Plaint of Severity marks two players for spread. Four Time Gate portals each require a solo player. Summon Alexander fires Communion laser beams — avoid the puddle hazards they leave behind.

bosses.name: Lugat
bosses.tip: Dodge Hydroball and frontal cleaves. Move away during Amorphous Applause and keep water AoEs from overlapping the party.

bosses.name: The Governor
bosses.tip: Kill adds quickly and avoid line and circle AoEs during possession sequences.

bosses.name: Lorelei
bosses.tip: Virgin Tears leaves dangerous puddles. Morbid Advance and Morbid Retreat force movement, so pre-position away from hazards.

bosses.name: Amikiri
bosses.tip: Kill the leg target to free trapped players and avoid large conal attacks.

bosses.name: Ruby Princess
bosses.tip: Hide inside treasure coffers during Seduce to avoid charm, then dodge fans and spread markers.

bosses.name: Shisui Yohi
bosses.tip: Avoid line AoEs and water puddles. Handle targeted circles away from the group and clear adds promptly.

bosses.name: Garula
bosses.tip: Hide behind pillars for Rush, spread marked attacks, and avoid charge paths.

bosses.name: Bardam
bosses.tip: Mechanics trial: watch the ground, move through sequential safe zones, and focus on survival rather than damage.

bosses.name: Yol
bosses.tip: Dodge Feathercut, line dives, and wing attacks by watching boss orientation.

bosses.name: Magitek Rearguard
bosses.tip: Avoid missile circles, rotating line fire, and targeted bombardments.

bosses.name: Magitek Hexadrone
bosses.tip: Dodge rotating wall and laser patterns while keeping mines and adds under control.

bosses.name: Hypertuned Grynewaht
bosses.tip: Spread for explosives, dodge chainsaw lines, and kill adds before fire patches crowd the arena.

bosses.name: Magna Roader
bosses.tip: Use cannons to interrupt charge phases. Avoid tunnel rushes and line AoEs.

bosses.name: Number XXIV
bosses.tip: Read the elemental field and move to the safe zone before each spell resolves.

bosses.name: Inferno
bosses.tip: Dodge frontal and side cleaves, destroy bits, and avoid missile patterns.

bosses.name: Magitek Scorpion
bosses.tip: Avoid tail lasers, mines, and missile AoEs. Move behind or beside the boss for wide frontal attacks.

bosses.name: Aulus mal Asina
bosses.tip: When separated from your body, return before the timer expires. Dodge hand lasers and targeted circles.

bosses.name: Zenos yae Galvus
bosses.tip: Dodge sword phase patterns, then resolve stack and spread markers between heavy raid-wide hits.

bosses.name: Zuiko-maru
bosses.tip: Avoid bomb explosions and line attacks. Clear adds before the arena becomes crowded.

bosses.name: Dojun-maru
bosses.tip: Watch wide cleaves and summoned weapon patterns. Keep the boss faced away from the party.

bosses.name: Yojimbo
bosses.tip: Collect coins before the boss does, avoid Daigoro, and dodge large sword arcs.

bosses.name: Coeurl Sruti
bosses.tip: Spread for lightning, avoid frontal swipes, and clear adds quickly.

bosses.name: Arbuda
bosses.tip: Move out for point-blank attacks and in for donut patterns. Watch mirrored AoEs.

bosses.name: Ivon Coeurlfist
bosses.tip: Dodge martial arts patterns and clone line charges by identifying the safe lane early.

bosses.name: Kelpie
bosses.tip: Aim knockbacks away from water hazards and avoid whirlpools and puddles.

bosses.name: The Old One
bosses.tip: Use the transformation action to survive and clear obstacles, then spread after returning to normal.

bosses.name: Hrodric Poisontongue
bosses.tip: Look away from gaze attacks, dodge tail swipes, and place poison puddles at the edges.

bosses.name: Otake-maru
bosses.tip: Avoid fiery circles and knockbacks while clearing add waves.

bosses.name: Kamaitachi
bosses.tip: Wind AoEs and tornadoes control the arena. Reposition early for knockbacks.

bosses.name: Genbu
bosses.tip: Stack for shared damage, avoid water puddles, and defeat adds quickly.

bosses.name: Motherbit
bosses.tip: Bits fire laser grids across the arena. Stand in gaps and avoid overlapping targeted AoEs.

bosses.name: The Ultima Warrior
bosses.tip: Dodge primal-inspired patterns and handle stack markers cleanly.

bosses.name: The Ultima Beast
bosses.tip: Avoid large frontal swipes and targeted AoEs. Save mitigation for repeated raid damage.

bosses.name: Otengu
bosses.tip: Avoid fan and line AoEs while staying clear of tornado paths.

bosses.name: Daidarabotchi
bosses.tip: Watch the raised hand and move to the lane that will remain safe.

bosses.name: Qitian Dasheng
bosses.tip: Clone attacks and staff lines resolve in sequence. Move again after the first hit.

bosses.name: Hedetet
bosses.tip: Hide behind crystals for major attacks and avoid sand puddles.

bosses.name: Defective Drone
bosses.tip: Dodge line lasers and rotating drone attacks from the arena edge.

bosses.name: Mist Dragon
bosses.tip: Break ice prisons, avoid sweeping breath, and track the dragon during fog phases.

bosses.name: Nullchu
bosses.tip: Avoid frontal attacks and exploding plant hazards. Kill adds before poison effects spread.

bosses.name: Lakhamu
bosses.tip: Move early for mud and water AoEs, and spread targeted circles away from the party.

bosses.name: Tokkapchi
bosses.tip: Use safe lanes between large AoEs and avoid stacking poison puddles.

bosses.name: Mark III-B Magitek Colossus
bosses.tip: Dodge cannon lines, proximity explosions, and artillery fire.

bosses.name: Prometheus
bosses.tip: Watch trench direction when the boss dives underground and avoid emerging line attacks.

bosses.name: Annia and Julia quo Soranus
bosses.tip: Dodge synchronized gunblade attacks while resolving stack, spread, and line markers cleanly.

bosses.name: Susano
bosses.tip: Dodge expanding lightning and line AoEs. During Ame-no-Murakumo, one tank blocks the sword while the party destroys it.

bosses.name: Lakshmi
bosses.tip: Use Vril before major attacks. Spread for targeted circles, stack for shared damage, and refresh Vril from orbs.

bosses.name: Shinryu
bosses.tip: Watch platform damage, tail slams, and elemental tells. Kill the tail when targetable and mitigate repeated raid hits.

bosses.name: Tsukuyomi
bosses.tip: Balance moonlight and darkness stacks during the transition. Handle fans, spears, stack markers, and add priority.

bosses.name: Byakko
bosses.tip: Avoid tiger charges, stack for shared damage, and dodge orbs during the falling phase.

bosses.name: Suzaku
bosses.tip: Handle phoenix adds and stand in the correct rune during the song phase. Dodge rotating line patterns later.

bosses.name: Seiryu
bosses.tip: Dodge line charges and water eruptions, then handle add waves before the arena changes.

bosses.name: Rathalos
bosses.tip: Limited healing trial. Avoid tail swipes and charges, use the duty action carefully, and sever the tail when possible.

bosses.name: Yojimbo
bosses.tip: Collect coins, dodge Daigoro, and avoid large sword arcs and arena tricks.

bosses.name: Susano
bosses.tip: Assign sword blocks, lightning positions, and orb soaks. Loose spreading is the main danger.

bosses.name: Lakshmi
bosses.tip: Plan Vril usage for Divine Denial and major raid hits. Charm and add phases require quick target swaps.

bosses.name: Shinryu
bosses.tip: Assign positions for tail, wings, elemental platforms, and Akh Morn sequences.

bosses.name: Tsukuyomi
bosses.tip: Assign meteor and moon phase positions. Final fans and spears require disciplined movement.

bosses.name: Byakko
bosses.tip: Coordinate tiger baits, stack positions, falling-phase orb dodges, and tank swaps.

bosses.name: Suzaku
bosses.tip: Assign colors and movement for the song transition. Later rotations combine runes, birds, stacks, and knockbacks.

bosses.name: Seiryu
bosses.tip: Plan add assignments, knockback mitigation, and line bait positions.

bosses.name: Rathalos
bosses.tip: Four-player encounter with limited healing. Avoidable damage is the core check.

bosses.name: Mateus, the Corrupt
bosses.tip: Free players from ice blocks and avoid water/ice overlaps. Adds and frozen safe zones control positioning.

bosses.name: Hashmal, Bringer of Order
bosses.tip: Avoid earth towers, line cleaves, and falling pillars. Hide behind the correct rubble for room-wide attacks.

bosses.name: Rofocale
bosses.tip: Dodge charge lanes and chariot attacks. Keep alliance positions stable when the boss crosses the arena.

bosses.name: Argath Thadalfus
bosses.tip: Obey or disobey command debuffs as indicated. Masks, gaze attacks, and adds punish automatic movement.

bosses.name: Famfrit, the Darkening Cloud
bosses.tip: Watch the water jug orientation to identify unsafe quadrants. Spread, stack, and avoid knockbacks into blasts.

bosses.name: Belias, the Gigas
bosses.tip: Time bomb and clock mechanics require correct floor positions. Kill adds before their casts complete.

bosses.name: Construct 7
bosses.tip: Math mechanics require matching your HP result to floor circles. Stop moving for acceleration bombs.

bosses.name: Yiazmat
bosses.tip: Avoid magnetic pulls, cyclones, and large cleaves while handling add phases.

bosses.name: Mustadio
bosses.tip: Read sniper aim and expose the correct side of your character. Spread and line attacks require quick facing changes.

bosses.name: Agrias
bosses.tip: Use shield and sword duty actions correctly during add phases. Stand in sacred zones to survive key attacks.

bosses.name: Thunder God Cid
bosses.tip: Handle alliance assignments, shadowblades, crush weapon markers, and adds without overlapping large AoEs.

bosses.name: Ultima, the High Seraph
bosses.tip: Dodge maze and transformation mechanics while resolving alliance stacks and heavy raid-wide damage.

bosses.name: Alte Roite
bosses.tip: Dodge Charybdis puddles, stack for Clamp, and avoid knockbacks during platform changes.

bosses.name: Catastrophe
bosses.tip: Use levitation to avoid ground effects and drop down for airborne attacks.

bosses.name: Halicarnassus
bosses.tip: Role and tile mechanics determine safe positions. Handle stack/spread markers while watching forced movement.

bosses.name: Exdeath
bosses.tip: Void and elemental mechanics alter familiar AoEs. Read Thunder, Blizzard, Fire, and White Hole tells.

bosses.name: Phantom Train
bosses.tip: Avoid ghosts, handle passenger-car adds, and watch knockbacks near the train edge.

bosses.name: Chadarnook
bosses.tip: Use paintings for the correct protection or effect. Separate Demon and Goddess mechanics cleanly.

bosses.name: Guardian
bosses.tip: Program loads recreate previous mechanics. Identify each pattern before movement or add checks resolve.

bosses.name: Kefka
bosses.tip: Question-mark telegraphs can lie. Resolve towers, stacks, and Forsaken patterns carefully.

bosses.name: Chaos
bosses.tip: Elemental attacks chain together. Pre-position for knockbacks and resolve pairs before the next cast.

bosses.name: Midgardsormr
bosses.tip: Dodge dive paths, Akh Morn-style stacks, and dragon add mechanics.

bosses.name: Omega
bosses.tip: Starboard and Larboard are side cleaves relative to the boss. Move to the opposite side of the cast.

bosses.name: Omega-M and Omega-F
bosses.tip: Handle paired boss mechanics, shared damage, and targeted AoEs without unnecessary boss overlap.

bosses.name: Final Omega
bosses.tip: Patch and Hello World-style debuffs require assigned positions. Watch debuff icons and crossing lines.

bosses.name: Twintania, Nael, Bahamut Prime, Golden Bahamut
bosses.tip: Strict mitigation, positioning, and phase memory encounter. Use a dedicated current guide for synced progression.

bosses.name: Garuda, Ifrit, Titan, Lahabrea, Ultima Weapon
bosses.tip: Awakening mechanics and primal phase order are the core checks. Assign cleanses, baits, and mitigation before pulling.

bosses.name: Forgiven Dissonance
bosses.tip: Avoid frontal cone attacks and move between the sweeping ground eruptions as they rotate around the arena.

bosses.name: Tesleen, the Forgiven
bosses.tip: Dodge line and circle AoEs while killing spawned sin eaters quickly before the arena fills with damage zones.

bosses.name: Philia
